title: Lightway Homes and Investment Introduces Roman Heights: A New Landmark in Affordable Luxury Living in Arepo
description: In a commitment to providing high-quality, affordable, and sustainable housing solutions for Nigerians, Lightway Homes and Investment Limited proudly unveils Roman Heights. Nestled in the heart of Are
html:
In a commitment to providing high-quality, affordable, and sustainable housing solutions for Nigerians, Lightway Homes and Investment Limited proudly unveils Roman Heights. Nestled in the heart of Arepo, a border community adjacent to Lagos and often referred to as Magodo Phase III, Roman Heights emerges as a towering architectural marvel.

Roman Heights, a statement piece in luxury living, is poised to redefine Arepo’s skyline and offer an unparalleled urban lifestyle experience. Lightway Homes and Investment Limited envisions Roman Heights as the ultimate high-rise luxury masterpiece, setting a precedent for exceptional living in Arepo.

According to Funmi Adesanya, MD Lightway Homes, Roman Heights epitomizes high-rise luxury living in Arepo, a first of its kind. “Nigerians can anticipate an elevated lifestyle featuring a rooftop lounge, an inviting swimming pool, a convenient elevator, modern co-working office spaces, a fully equipped gym, uninterrupted power supply, ample parking facilities, and extraordinary communal areas.”

Roman Heights comprises six floors of exquisite apartments, featuring two units of spacious 3-bedroom apartments and eight units of stylish 2-bedroom maisonettes. This deluxe yet affordable housing development has been meticulously designed to fulfill the aspirations of those in search of their dream homes.

Lightway Homes and Investment Limited emphasizes that the opportunity to invest in Roman Heights is open to a diverse range of individuals, including young professionals, first-time homeowners, savvy investors, and Nigerians living abroad. The property presents an excellent opportunity for generating rental income, making it an ideal investment for those seeking to capitalize on short-term letting.

“Roman Heights offers a unique proposition for Nigerians living abroad,” the CEO noted. “Whether as a residence or an income-generating asset through short-term letting while away, Roman Heights serves a dual purpose, ensuring your investment is not only a source of income but also a comfortable abode whenever you are in the country.”

Roman Heights represents a significant milestone for Lightway Homes and Investment Limited in its mission to provide affordable luxury housing solutions that cater to the evolving needs and aspirations of Nigerians.

Lightway Homes and Investment Limited is a leading real estate development company dedicated to creating affordable, sustainable, and high-quality housing solutions for the Nigerian market. With a commitment to excellence and innovation, Lightway Homes and Investment Limited strives to redefine urban living standards and contribute positively to communities across Nigeria.
